title: My Brother Drained Dad's Account Of $380K, Left Me Nothing. So I Took His Medical License.
description: When my neurologist brother tricked our father with dementia into signing over power of attorney, he drained $380,000 from a custodial account we co-owned by billing for sham home visits. I discovered Dad's hidden note warning me, filed a complaint with the state medical board, got his license suspended, and won a $520,000 civil judgment that forced him to sell his practice. #RevengeStory #MedicalFraud #SiblingBetrayal
thumb_text: HE DRAINED DAD'S $380K. I TOOK HIS LICENSE.

thumb_lines.text: HE ABUSED POWER OF ATTORNEY TO EMPTY OUR JOINT ACCOUNT
I REPORTED HIM TO THE STATE BOARD
HE LOST HIS LICENSE AND PRACTICE
